summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All new features (WhatsApp floating button, CSV export, email service methods) are working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: CSV export endpoint returns valid CSV with correct headers (ID, Nombre, Email, Teléfono, Departamento, Cultivo, Hectáreas, Mensaje, Estado, Fecha)
Backend: CSV export returns 401 without authentication
Backend: CSV export respects status_filter query parameter
Backend: CSV export filename format is correct (origenes_consultas_YYYYMMDD_HHMM.csv)
Backend: Status change to 'contacted' triggers email attempt (logs warning due to missing GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD)
Backend: Status change to 'closed' triggers email attempt
Backend: email_service has send_contact_notification method
Backend: email_service has send_status_update method
Backend: send_contact_notification returns False without GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD
Backend: send_status_update returns False without GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD
Backend: Admin stats endpoint works with auth
Backend: Admin contacts endpoint works with auth
Frontend: WhatsApp button visible on landing page with data-testid='whatsapp-float-btn'
Frontend: WhatsApp button href contains correct phone number (wa.me/573005582757)
Frontend: WhatsApp pre-filled message contains 'Hola ORÍGENES', 'departamento', 'cultivo'
Frontend: WhatsApp button has fixed position (floating) with classes 'fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50'
Frontend: WhatsApp button remains visible after scrolling
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'Exportar CSV' button with data-testid='admin-export-csv-btn'
Frontend: Clicking 'Exportar CSV' triggers file download with correct filename
Frontend: Admin dashboard stats cards display correctly (Total, Pendientes, Contactados, Cerrados)
Frontend: Admin contacts table displays with status dropdowns
Frontend: Contact form on landing page is functional
Frontend: Contact form submission creates new contact via API
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created with TEST_ prefix for backend API testing (TEST_EmailTrigger, TEST_EmailTriggerClosed, TEST_Iteration4_Final)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features working correctly: 1) WhatsApp floating button on landing page with correct href and pre-filled message, 2) CSV export from admin panel with proper headers and status filtering, 3) Email service has send_contact_notification and send_status_update methods that gracefully handle missing GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD. Previous features (auth, admin dashboard, contact form) continue to work.

verified_integrations.WhatsApp Button: Working - fixed position, correct href (wa.me/573005582757), pre-filled message with placeholders
verified_integrations.CSV Export: Working - returns valid CSV with 10 columns, respects status_filter, requires auth
verified_integrations.Email Service: Working - methods exist and return False gracefully when GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD not configured
verified_integrations.Admin Dashboard: Working - stats, contacts list, CSV export button, status updates

email_service_note: Email sending is NOT MOCKED but will skip due to missing GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD - this is expected behavior. The service logs warnings but does not fail requests.
